debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  let f' : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := λ x => ⟨f x.val,
    ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, x.prop.1, rfl⟩,
     by intro h; exact x.prop.2 (h1 x.prop.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  exists f'
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.prop.1 x2.prop.1 (congrArg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro y
    have h_im : y.val ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact y.prop.1
    rcases h_im with ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩
    have hx_na : x ≠ a := by
      intro hxa
      rw [hxa, h4] at hxf
      exact y.prop.2 hxf.symm
    exists ⟨x, hxA, hx_na⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hxf
successful_attempts:
by
  let f' : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := λ x => ⟨f x.val,
    ⟨by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, x.prop.1, rfl⟩,
     by intro h; exact x.prop.2 (h1 x.prop.1 h3 (h.trans h4.symm))⟩⟩
  exists f'
  constructor
  · intros x1 x2 heq
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact h1 x1.prop.1 x2.prop.1 (congrArg Subtype.val heq)
  · intro y
    have h_im : y.val ∈ image f A := by rw [h2]; exact y.prop.1
    rcases h_im with ⟨x, hxA, hxf⟩
    have hx_na : x ≠ a := by
      intro hxa
      rw [hxa, h4] at hxf
      exact y.prop.2 hxf.symm
    exists ⟨x, hxA, hx_na⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hxf
